test.command: cd cli && cargo test --jobs 5 && cd ../spikes-hosted/worker && npx vitest run

lint.command: cd ../spikes-hosted/worker && npx eslint src/ && cd ../../spikes/cli && cargo clippy -- -D warnings

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention for downloaded executable integrity verification (checksum/signature validation before execution), especially for release-asset wrappers and CI download steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: scrutiny review for npm-mcp-wrapper flagged direct download/extract/execute without artifact verification in packages/spikes-mcp/lib.js, with a similar unverified download pattern in action/action.yml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update worker-fullstack skill guidance to align markdown location rules with declared scope for site content (llms.txt/llms-full.txt/agents.md), and add an npm packaging sanity step (e.g., npm pack --dry-run) for package-manifest changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews observed SKILL.md mismatch between site-content scope and './docs/' markdown instruction; npm-mcp-wrapper review also found package.json files-manifest drift that a pack dry-run would catch.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature-level grep-based llms tool-count verification is brittle.
